shellCommands.command:
set -e
cd /home/user/workspace
mkdir -p vectorops/src/vectorops
cat > vectorops/pyproject.toml <<'EOF'
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=61"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "vectorops"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Vector operations utilities"
readme = "README.md"
requires-python = ">=3.8"

[tool.setuptools]
package-dir = {"" = "src"}

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
where = ["src"]
EOF
cat > vectorops/README.md <<'EOF'
# vectorops

A tiny package with a dot product function.
EOF
cat > vectorops/src/vectorops/__init__.py <<'EOF'
"""vectorops package."""

from .core import dotproduct

__all__ = ["dotproduct"]
EOF
cat > vectorops/src/vectorops/core.py <<'EOF'
"""Core vector operations."""

from typing import Sequence


def dotproduct(a: Sequence[float], b: Sequence[float]) -> float:
    if len(a) != len(b):
        raise ValueError("Vectors must have the same length")
    return sum(x * y for x, y in zip(a, b))
EOF
python3 -m pip install --user --upgrade build >/tmp/vectorops-pip-build.log 2>&1 || (cat /tmp/vectorops-pip-build.log; exit 1)
python3 -m build vectorops >/tmp/vectorops-build.log 2>&1 || (cat /tmp/vectorops-build.log; exit 1)
python3 -m pip install --user --upgrade pypiserver >/tmp/vectorops-pypiserver-install.log 2>&1 || (cat /tmp/vectorops-pypiserver-install.log; exit 1)
mkdir -p /home/user/workspace/pypi-packages
cp vectorops/dist/* /home/user/workspace/pypi-packages/
nohup python3 -m pypiserver -p 8080 -P . -a . /home/user/workspace/pypi-packages >/tmp/pypiserver.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /tmp/pypiserver.pid
sleep 2
curl -fsS http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ >/tmp/vectorops-index-check.html
python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-test-venv
. /tmp/vectorops-test-venv/bin/activate
pip install --upgrade pip >/dev/null
pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 >/tmp/vectorops-install.log 2>&1 || (cat /tmp/vectorops-install.log; exit 1)
python - <<'PY'
from vectorops import dotproduct
assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1])
print('ok')
PY
npm run build
